full_text:
Yu Bao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yu Baowas born in Kuaiji. Took refuge with Zhu Fu but so oppressive that revolts broke out and drove Zhu Fu away. Yu Bao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
